shortDescription.default: Shows the Microsoft Entra sponsors of the signed-in guest user on a SharePoint landing page.

longDescription.default: The Guest Sponsor Info web part displays the sponsor cards for the currently signed-in Microsoft Entra guest user. Each card shows the sponsor's photo (or an initials fallback), display name, and job title. Hovering or focusing a card reveals the sponsor's email address, phone number, office location, and department. The web part is invisible to member (non-guest) users in view mode and shows a lightweight placeholder in edit mode so page authors can place and configure it without being a guest themselves. Sponsor availability is determined via Microsoft Graph using the least-privilege User.ReadBasic.All permission.

features.title: Guest Sponsor Info
features.description: The feature that activates elements of the Guest Sponsor Info web part.
